scripts.build:fat: tsc --noEmit && VITE_ACTIVITY_ID=tata-silent-personality-2026-fat-1.0 VITE_ENV_LABEL='FAT ENV' VITE_SHARE_URL=https://fat-tata.cdbzzy.cn/ VITE_H5_DATA_SOURCE=api VITE_H5_API_BASE_URL= vite build --mode fat --outDir dist/fat
scripts.build:tcfzyq: tsc --noEmit && VITE_ACTIVITY_ID=tata-silent-personality-2026-fat-1.0 VITE_ENV_LABEL='TEST ENV' VITE_SHARE_URL=https://tcfzyq.online/ VITE_H5_DATA_SOURCE=api VITE_H5_API_BASE_URL= vite build --mode fat --outDir dist/tcfzyq
scripts.build:testing: tsc --noEmit && VITE_ACTIVITY_ID=tata-silent-personality-2026-test VITE_ENV_LABEL='TEST ENV' VITE_SHARE_URL=https://tata-test.cdsparkling.cn/ vite build --mode testing --outDir dist/testing
scripts.build:production: tsc --noEmit && VITE_ACTIVITY_ID=tata-silent-personality-2026 VITE_ENV_LABEL='PROD ENV' VITE_SHARE_URL=https://tata.tcfzyq.online/ VITE_H5_DATA_SOURCE=api VITE_H5_API_BASE_URL= vite build --mode production --outDir dist/production
